videos.headline: Stanford fans rush field after upsetting No. 3 Oregon in OT
videos.description: Stanford denies Oregon in overtime to clinch a 31-24 win, and the Cardinal faithful rush the field to celebrate.

videos.headline: Tanner McKee finds Brycen Tremayne for a Stanford TD
videos.description: Tanner McKee connects with Brycen Tremayne for an 18-yard touchdown pass in the first quarter.

videos.headline: Anthony Brown walks in for an Oregon TD
videos.description: Anthony Brown calls his own number for Oregon's first points against Stanford.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF One-Play (Anthony Brown walks in for an Oregon TD) 2021/10/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Isaiah Sanders muscles in for a Stanford TD
videos.description: Isaiah Sanders runs in for a Stanford touchdown to extend its lead vs. Oregon.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF One-Play (Isaiah Sanders pounds in for an Stanford TD) 2021/10/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon scores as CJ Verdell converts at the goal line
videos.description: CJ Verdell bowls into the end zone to help Oregon cut into Stanford's lead.

videos.headline: Stanford scores TD on final play of regulation to force OT vs. Oregon
videos.description: Elijah Higgins wins a jump ball in the end zone to score the game-tying touchdown for Stanford with no time remaining on the clock.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Stanford scores TD on final play of regulation to force OT vs. Oregon) 2021/10/2 ESHEET

videos.headline: Stanford strikes first in OT as Humphreys pinballs into end zone
videos.description: Stanford WR John Humphreys catches a pass and bounces off of multiple Oregon defenders en route to scoring a 14-yard touchdown.
